query:
SELECT a.id, a.name, a.turmaId, a.trilhaId, 
       ap.id as pdiId, ap.trilhaId as pdiTrilhaId, ap.turmaId as pdiTurmaId
FROM alunos a 
LEFT JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ap.alunoId = a.id
WHERE a.name LIKE '%Wandemberg%'
